creator: glennpj@charter.net
text:
An upgrade of the apache2 port will overwrite the existing
        configuration files.

Fix: 

There are probably several ways to fix this.  One would be
        to follow the lead of the apache13 port and check for the
        configuration files via commands in pkg-plist.
How-To-Repeat: 
        Install apache2, modify configuration files, reinstall and note
        that configuration files have been overwritten.
